channel.title: The Mutapa Times — Zimbabwe Stories
channel.description: Packed Instagram-Story autolist — business, property, jobs and internships in one feed. Each item ships with a 1080×1920 story card and a 'Read more on Mutapa Times' CTA.

item.title: Zimbabwe breaks mineral export record
item.description: Business Reporter Zimbabwe recorded an 84 percent surge in mineral export revenue in the first half of 2026, generating a record US$2,532 billion from US$1,376 billion in the same period... via Ebusiness Weekly #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews
